sibling.name: RICHARD TEUTONICUS NEVILLE or NOVAVILLA "the Teuton"

zh.Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Fra: 法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利艾
zh.Caen, Calvados, Normandy, France: 法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱
zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk d'Aunou於大約0990年出生在法國時，他的父親Balderic the Teuton15歲，母親Aubrée or Alix de Brionne14歲。他於大約1011年與Miss de Benefacta在法國諾門迪結婚。他去世於1066年之後。

zh-hans.Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Fra: 法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利艾
zh-hans.Caen, Calvados, Normandy, France: 法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulk d'Aunou于大约0990年出生在法国时，他的父亲Balderic the Teuton15岁，母亲Aubrée or Alix de Brionne14岁。他于大约1011年与Miss de Benefacta在法国諾門迪结婚。他去世于1066年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk d'Aunou was born about 0990, in France, his father, Balderic the Teuton, was 15 and his mother, Aubrée or Alix de Brionne, was 14. He married Miss de Benefacta about 1011, in Normandy, France. He died after 1066.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk d'Aunou est né environ 0990, à France, son père, Balderic the Teuton, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Aubrée or Alix de Brionne, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Miss de Benefacta environ 1011, à Normandie, France. Il est décédé après 1066.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulk d'Aunou um 0990 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Balderic the Teuton 15 und seine Mutter Aubrée or Alix de Brionne 14. Er hat um 1011 in Normandie, Frankreich Miss de Benefacta geheiratet. Er starb nach 1066.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk d'Aunou è nato il circa 0990 nel Francia, il suo padre, Balderic the Teuton, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Aubrée or Alix de Brionne, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Miss de Benefacta circa 1011, nel Normandie, Francia. Morì dopo il 1066.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulk d'Aunouが約0990年にフランスで生まれた時，父Balderic the Teutonは15歳，母Aubrée or Alix de Brionneは14歳であった。約1011年にフランスノーマンディでMiss de Benefactaと結婚した。彼は1066年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fulk d'Aunou(이)가 대략 0990년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Balderic the Teuton(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Aubrée or Alix de Brionne(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1011년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Miss de Benefacta(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1066년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk d'Aunou nasceu aproximadamente 0990, em França, seu pai, Balderic the Teuton, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Aubrée or Alix de Brionne, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Miss de Benefacta aproximadamente 1011, em Normandie, França. Ele faleceu após 1066.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk d'Aunou родился около 0990 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Balderic the Teuton было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Aubrée or Alix de Brionne, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Miss de Benefacta около 1011 г. в местности норманди, Франция. Он умер после 1066 г.

sm.about 990–after 1066: e tusa o le 0990–ina ua ma'ea le 1066
sm.from 1033 to 1053: mai le 1033 e o'o I le 1053

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fulk d'Aunou nació aproximadamente 0990, en Francia, su papá, Balderic the Teuton, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Aubrée or Alix de Brionne, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Miss de Benefacta aproximadamente 1011, en Normandie, Francia. Murió después de 1066.
